markdown_content:
## Vision & Objectif

Elysium is a universal, fractal civilizational ontology — a minimal, elegant map of human, social, and planetary evolution. It maps ALL dimensions of civilization through 3 Scales and 7 Foundations.


## Architecture Validee


### 3 Scales

- Human — Individual, personal, interior
- Society — Collective, institutional, communal
- Civilization — Planetary, species-level, epochal

### 7 Foundations

1. Foundation (Material Base) — Energy, Water, Habitat, Infrastructure, Mobility, Materials
1. Vitality (Life and Ecology) — Health, Food, Biodiversity, Ecosystems, Regeneration
1. Agency (Economy and Production) — Economy, Work, Finance, Entrepreneurship, Innovation, Production
1. Cohesion (Community and Culture) — Community, Relationships, Culture, Art, Media, Identity
1. Governance (Coordination and Law) — Law/Justice, Democracy, Institutions, Security, Communication
1. Vision (Knowledge and Foresight) — Education, Science, Foresight, Systems Thinking, Technology
1. Consciousness (Meaning and Purpose) — Ethics, Spirituality, Purpose, Worldview, Civilizational Direction

## Contexte et Historique

- Previously explored as Yworld
- Renamed to Elysium (June 2026)
- Phase 1 Research: 126 models analyzed across 8 lots (A-H)
- Phase 2 Design: 35 Facets defined, 7 Foundation Matrices (12-step), Book ToC produced
- Validated via: Worldchanging coverage test (100%), Fractal scale test (4.7/5), Emergent cluster analysis

## Etat Actuel

Phase 2 Complete. Architecture validated. Facets defined. Book ToC ready.


## Prochaines Etapes

- [ ] Phase 3: Run 12-step matrix on 35 Facets (book content generation)
- [ ] Visualisation: Mandala / diagram of 7 Foundations x 3 Scales
- [ ] Platform: Interactive webapp to navigate the ontology
- [ ] Book: Write chapters based on matrices

## Ressources Cles

- Research dataset: 126 model cards (Markdown, CSV, JSON)
- Core JSON: ELYSIUM_CORE_ONTOLOGY.json
- Book ToC: 16_ELYSIUM_BOOK_TOC.md
- 7 Foundation Matrices: 15_THE_7_MATRICES.md

## Notes et Reflexions

The 7-layer structure is remarkably convergent across 126 independent models from developmental psychology, systems theory, ecology, economics, wisdom traditions, and critical theory. The fractal property (same structure at Human/Society/Civilization scale) is the key differentiator from flat ontologies like SDGs.
